data.title: ECD Auto Design unveils 2026 lineup expansion incl. heritage programs, modern platforms, and safety upgrades.
data.description: ECD has recently revealed plans for a significant expansion of its product offerings in 2026. This expansion will introduce a range of new programs including heritage-inspired sports coupes, classic SUVs, and modern lifestyle vehicles.

data.title: South Africa's telecom and electronic device retail trade set for steady growth till 2030, driven by network expansion, consumer demand, and policy changes. - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A new report titled "Telecommunications and Retail Trade of Electronic Devices in South Africa 2025" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights key trends, market dynamics, and strategic changes impacting telephony, internet, wireless internet, and related infrastructure in South Africa. Additionally, it explores the retail market for electronic devices including mobile phones and tablets. This report provides valuable insights into the industry.

data.title: Vietnam's System Integrator Market to peak by 2031 with SCADA lead & AI, IoT integration; tech growth fueled by Industry 4.0.
data.description: A recent report titled "Vietnam System Integrator Market 2025-2031" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Vietnam System Integrator Market is witnessing substantial growth driven by the growing acceptance of Industry 4.0 technologies, the expansion of ICT infrastructure, and a growing mobile subscriber base. From 2022 to 2024, Vietnam's digital economy showed consistent growth, with the ICT sector expanding due to efforts like enhancing broadband penetration and the introduction of 5G technology.

data.title: Bullish signals suggest Bitcoin's outlook is improving. 10x Research predicts larger price moves. Weak capital inflows caused stagnation after Oct. 10 crash.
data.description: The future prospects for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in 2026 are showing signs of improvement after facing consistent downward pressure following a significant liquidation event on October 10. 10x Research has noted a unique combination of factors including options positioning, decreased volatility, and technical exhaustion that historically indicates the potential for significant price movements. The recent lack of positive movement in Bitcoin's value has not been due to unfavorable valuations, but rather a result of limited capital inflows. Investors have favored other assets leading up to the year-end, resulting in Bitcoin being largely overlooked. Since the October 10 crash, the market structure of Bitcoin has continued to weaken due to outflows from ETFs. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: U.S. stock futures dipped after Christmas Day, with major benchmarks down. Initial jobless claims dropped to 214,000. Dow Jones -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.06%, Nasdaq 100 -0.06%. Nvidia shares rose 0.58% after striking a licensing agreement with AI chip startup Groq. Treasury bonds: 10-year at 4.15%, two-year at 3.51%. FedWatch tool shows 84.5% likelihood of Fed maintaining current interest rates in January. SPY up 0.019% at $690.25, QQQ advanced 0.034% to $624.14 in premarket.
data.description: U.S. stock futures saw a decline after a higher close on Wednesday, with major benchmark indices falling. The New York Stock Exchange closed early for Christmas. Initial jobless claims in the U.S. dropped by 10,000 to 214,000, better than market estimates of 223,000. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.15%, and the two-year bond stood at 3.51%. The FedWatch tool indicated an 84.5% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping current interest rates unchanged in January. Futures changes were: Dow Jones -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.06%, Nasdaq 100 -0.06%, Russell 2000 -0.27%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was up 0.019% at $690.25, while the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF advanced 0.034% to $624.14 in premarket trading. Nvidia Corp. shares rose by 0.58% following a non-exclusive licensing agreement with AI chip startup Groq. NVDA's share price trend was strong in the short, medium, and long terms. (Word count: 126)

data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures creates Snapt Beverages as brand development division; Snapt is a wholly owned subsidiary.
data.description: Austin, Texas-based company Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) revealed on December 26, 2025 the launch of Snapt Beverages as its manufacturing and brand development arm. This move solidifies Golden Triangle Ventures’ position as a vertically integrated consumer products platform geared for expansion. Snapt Beverages functions as a wholly owned subsidiary of the company.

data.title: China sanctions 20 U.S. defense contractors and 10 executives due to $10 billion arms sale to Taiwan. Notable companies include Northrop Grumman, Boeing, Anduril.
data.description: In response to a $10 billion arms sale to Taiwan, China imposed sanctions on 20 U.S. defense contractors and 10 industry executives. Among those targeted were Anduril and its founder Palmer Lucky. The sanctioned companies include Northrop Grumman and Boeing.

data.title: Tesla intensifies robotaxi push before Musk's deadline in 5 days to eliminate safety monitors, per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: With only five days left, the pressure is on Elon Musk to deliver on his commitment to eliminate robotaxi safety monitors. The countdown is on for Tesla as they intensify their promotion of the robotaxi concept in the lead-up to Musk's imminent deadline. This development has caught the attention of investors and industry watchers alike. Stay tuned for updates on this evolving situation.

data.title: America250 organizes NYE celebration in Times Square to mark America turning 250, featuring surprise post-midnight event.
data.description: In the capital city of Washington, a celebration is set to take place as America reaches its 250th year milestone. The nonpartisan organization, America250, tasked by Congress to oversee the festivities honoring the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, has teamed up with One Times Square and the Times Square Alliance. They have revealed plans for an additional surprise event after midnight on New Year's Eve to kick off the Semiquincentennial year. This special moment is designed to commemorate the beginning of the historic year ahead.

data.title: Seoul introduces Stepping Stone Income to tackle jobless growth in the AI era, SIFSI 2025 reports positive outcomes.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, the SIFSI 2025 initiative has revealed encouraging outcomes for the Seoul Stepping Stone Income program. The report showcases its effectiveness, policy insights, and potential enhancements.

data.title: JETRO to host 31 Japanese startups at CES 2026, with thrice daily pitch events. Japan Pavilion at Venetian Expo.
data.description: Las Vegas-- The Japan External Trade Organization (JETRO) will be sponsoring the Japan Pavilion at CES 2026 in Las Vegas from January 6th to 9th. This year, JETRO is bringing 31 Japanese startups to showcase at CES, specifically in the startup arena Eureka Park. The Japan Pavilion will be situated at the Venetian Campus Venetian Expo 1F Hall G Booth #62801. In addition, within the Japan Pavilion, JETRO will establish a special event stage for hosting various presentations.

data.title: Onigilly Japanese Kitchen ends 2025 with record sales growth and expands franchise pipeline, celebrates new openings and menu innovation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Onigilly Japanese Kitchen, a fast-casual brand known for its traditional onigiri rice balls, is marking the end of 2025 with new store openings, menu enhancements, and advancements in franchise expansion. The company is experiencing growth as it moves into the new year.

data.title: Investors in Avantor, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before Dec 29, 2025 regarding class action securities lawsuit (NYSE: AVTR).
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit involving Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR). The lawsuit aims to assist investors in recovering losses. Specifically, it targets Avantor, Inc. shareholders who...
